zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Legh IV於1386年9月26日出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert de Legh III25歲，母親Isabel De Belgrave0歲。他於1404年與Matilda Norley在英國英格蘭爾阿茲武德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月15日在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Legh IV于1386年9月26日出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，他的父亲Robert de Legh III25岁，母亲Isabel De Belgrave0岁。他于1404年与Matilda Norley在英国英格兰爾阿茲武德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月15日在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Legh IV was born on 26 September 1386, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert de Legh III, was 25 and his mother, Isabel De Belgrave, was 0. He married Matilda Norley in 1404, in Adswood, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 October 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Legh IV est né le 26 septembre 1386, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Belgrave, avait 0 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Norley en 1404, à Adswood, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Legh IV am 26. September 1386 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Legh III 25 und seine Mutter Isabel De Belgrave 0. Er hat 1404 in Adswood, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Norley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh IV è nato il il 26 settembre 1386 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Legh III, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Belgrave, aveva 0 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Norley nel 1404, nel Adswood, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 ottobre 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh IVが1386年9月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh IIIは25歳，母Isabel De Belgraveは0歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドスウッドでMatilda Norleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月15日に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh IV(이)가 1386년 9월 26일 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Legh III(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Belgrave(은)는 0세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 아드스우드에서 Matilda Norley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Legh IV родился 26 сентября 1386 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Legh III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Belgrave, 0. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Norley в 1404 г. в местности адсвуд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 октября 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

Se casó con Matilda Norley en 1404, en Adswood, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1415, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
